details.description: A historic glass-and-iron conservatory set within a botanical garden. The central pavilion has a domed, mansard-like glazed roof with decorative iron cresting and large fanlight windows; long greenhouse wings extend to either side. The structure sits on a low masonry base and features a small glazed entrance porch. In the foreground are neatly arranged, labeled planting beds with spring blooms (including daffodils) on a manicured lawn. A few palm trees frame the entrance, and modern buildings are visible beyond the garden. Lighting is bright under a clear blue sky, suggesting midday.

details.description: A bright day with a vivid blue sky frames a grand glasshouse conservatory set in a public botanical garden. The central pavilion features a large arched glass dome with intricate decorative metalwork and two flanking glass wings, all in a late-19th-century iron-and-glass architectural style. The structure sits on a solid base with tall glass walls, revealing a palm tree inside. In the foreground, a well-kept lawn hosts colorful flower beds with yellow, red, and white blooms, and a few palm shrubs near the entrance. A paved path leads to the entrance, and in the background are low-rise modern buildings, suggesting an urban park setting in Nantes, France.

details.description: A historic iron-and-glass greenhouse complex with a central domed palm house (palmarium) and long lateral glasshouse wings, set within a formal botanical garden. In the foreground are gridded beds of labeled plants and spring flowers on a manicured lawn, with paths and a few visitors near the small entrance canopy. A palm tree stands by the doorway, and modern apartment buildings rise behind the garden under a clear blue sky.

details.description: A large glass-and-iron greenhouse with a central dome dominates the scene, identified as the Palmarium. The structure features tall glass walls, curved iron framework, and a rounded dome roof, typical of 19th-century palm houses. In the foreground, well-tended flower beds add splashes of color, while a clear blue sky and urban buildings provide a modern background. The Palmarium is set within Nantes' botanical garden area (Jardin des Plantes).

details.description: A vibrant, sunny view of the Jardin des Plantes in Nantes, featuring the historic Palmarium greenhouse as the central subject. The greenhouse is a 19th-century structure constructed of glass and metal with a brick base, characterized by a high, curved central roof and flanking wings. Inside the glass, palm fronds are visible. In the foreground, a manicured green lawn is interspersed with rectangular flower beds filled with blooming yellow daffodils and red tulips, each marked with small slate botanical identification labels on metal stakes. To the right, a lower, longer greenhouse section extends. In the background, modern white and grey apartment or office buildings rise above the garden wall, contrasting with the historic architecture. The sky is a clear, deep blue.

details.description: A vibrant daytime photograph of the Jardin des Plantes in Nantes, France. The central focus is a large, ornate 19th-century greenhouse (Palm House) constructed from glass and wrought iron, featuring a prominent domed roof with decorative metal cresting. In the foreground, a meticulously maintained lawn is dotted with various flower beds containing spring blooms like yellow daffodils and red tulips, each marked with small identification tags. To the left and right, additional smaller glass greenhouses are visible. The background shows modern multi-story residential or office buildings under a clear, deep blue sky. The lighting is bright and direct, casting soft shadows across the garden.

details.description: A historic iron-and-glass conservatory (palm house) with a tall central dome and ornate radial fanlight glazing, flanked by lower curved-roof wings. The greenhouse sits within a botanical garden featuring labeled planting beds, spring flowers, and a palm near the entrance. Behind it, on a higher terrace, are additional long glasshouses. The setting is urban, with apartment blocks beyond the garden walls. Lighting is bright with a clear blue sky.

details.description: An ornate glass-and-iron conservatory dominates the scene, featuring a prominent dome-shaped glass roof and decorative latticework. The structure sits in a formal garden with neatly arranged plant beds and small signage labeling the flora. A modern white apartment block rises behind the greenhouse, contrasting with the historic greenhouse architecture. Inside the glass enclosure, a tall palm tree is visible through the panes. The sky above is clear and blue.

details.description: An ornate historic glass-and-iron conservatory with a central domed pavilion and lower flanking greenhouse wings stands within a botanical garden. The structure features curved glazing, decorative metalwork radiating across the dome, and a masonry base. In the foreground are organized planting beds with many plant labels and spring flowers such as daffodils and tulips, set in clipped lawns and a path. A small palm is near the entrance. Modern low-rise residential buildings are visible behind the greenhouse under a clear blue sky, with a few visitors by the doorway.

details.description: The image is oriented sideways (rotated 90 degrees counter-clockwise), with the sky on the left and the ground on the right. When viewed upright, the scene depicts a sunny day in a botanical garden. The central subject is a historic 19th-century glasshouse, identified as the Serre de Bary, featuring a distinctive curved glass roof, intricate metal framework (likely iron), and a decorative ridge crest, all resting on a low brick base. A palm tree is visible near the structure. In the foreground, a green lawn is dotted with numerous small, rectangular plant identification labels on stakes, along with patches of spring flowers (daffodils and tulips). In the background, looming behind the historic greenhouse, is a contrasting modern, multi-story grey building with a flat roof, identified as the Institute of Botany. The sky is a clear, deep blue.

details.description: A vertical shot of the historic Palm House at the Botanical Garden of the University of Graz. The building features a prominent curved glass and iron roof with a decorative metal crest. In the foreground, a botanical display garden is visible, featuring patches of green grass, blooming yellow daffodils, and red tulips, each marked with small white identification labels. A palm tree stands near the entrance of the greenhouse. In the background, modern glass greenhouse structures and multi-story university buildings are visible under a clear, bright blue sky.
